data.data:
{"title":"Software development proposal draft","brief":"Draft a concise software development proposal for a tenant-scoped AI content platform with supervisor UI, public intake forms, and provider-backed draft generation.","summary":"This proposal outlines a development plan for an AI-driven content platform tailored for individual tenants, featuring a supervisor interface for oversight, public intake forms for user submissions, and integrated provider-backed AI draft generation. The solution aims to streamline content creation workflows within a 6-week delivery timeline and a budget between EUR 20,000 and 35,000.","proposalOutline":"1. Project Initialization and Requirements Refinement: Confirm scope and tenant-specific configurations.
2. Architecture Design: Develop multi-tenant AI content platform architecture ensuring data isolation and scalability.
3. Supervisor UI Development: Build an intuitive interface for supervisors to manage tenant content and workflows.
4. Public Intake Forms Implementation: Create customizable forms to capture user input securely.
5. Provider-Backed Draft Generation Integration: Integrate AI draft generation services to assist content creation.
6. Testing and Quality Assurance: Conduct thorough functional and performance testing.
7. Deployment and Documentation: Deploy the platform and provide comprehensive user and administrator documentation.
8. Support and Iteration: Offer post-launch support and plan for incremental improvements.","company":"Lightheart Holding","requestedTimeline":"6 weeks"}

embeddingReadiness.note: Semantic indexing is disabled because OPENAI_API_KEY is not configured.
